plugin.name: Launch Buddy
plugin.description: A friendly startup greeting with gentle timing, reactions, and optional sound.
config.enabled.label: Enable greetings
config.enabled.description: Let Launch Buddy greet you when OpenPets starts.
config.greetingMode.label: Greeting style
config.greetingMode.description: Choose how Launch Buddy picks a message.
config.customMessage.label: Custom message
config.customMessage.description: Used when Greeting style is Custom message.
config.messageList.label: Random messages
config.messageList.description: One message per line. Used for Random list.
config.frequency.label: Frequency
config.frequency.description: Keep greetings friendly instead of noisy.
config.awayHours.label: Away hours
config.awayHours.description: Minimum hours since the last greeting before greeting again.
config.delaySeconds.label: Startup delay
config.delaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait before greeting after startup.
config.reaction.label: Pet reaction
config.reaction.description: Reaction to show with the greeting.
config.soundEnabled.label: Play sound
config.soundChoice.label: Sound
config.soundChoice.description: Choose the built-in sound or your custom sound.
config.customSound.label: Custom sound
config.customSound.description: Used when Sound is Custom sound.
command.greetNow.title: Greet now
command.greetNow.description: Play the Launch Buddy greeting now.
command.reset.title: Reset Launch Buddy
indicator.label: Launch Buddy
speech.reset: Launch Buddy is reset. I can greet you again next time.
message.defaultCustom: Welcome back! I’m ready when you are.
message.smart.morning: Good morning! I’m here and ready whenever you are.
message.smart.afternoon: Good afternoon! Hope your day is moving along nicely.
message.smart.evening: Good evening! I’ll keep you company while you wrap things up.
message.smart.night: You’re up late—I'll keep things cozy and quiet.
message.random.0: Welcome back! Your buddy is ready.
message.random.1: Nice to see you again. Let’s make this session a good one.
message.random.2: OpenPets is awake, and so am I!
message.random.3: Hi there—I'll be nearby if you need a boost.
